name: Freeride Pro Directional
tagline: Premium directional freeride — confident and aggressive
description: Our most premium freeride construction. A directional board with early-rise tip rocker and aggressive camber underfoot, built for expert riders charging big-mountain lines and deep snow. Variable-angle fibreglass reinforcement and pre-cambered carbon fork inserts deliver precision and energy return.

specs.label: Profile
specs.value: Directional Camber with early-rise tip rocker

specs.label: Construction
specs.value: Hybrid cap/sidewall with sintered P-Tex sidewall profiling

specs.label: Fibreglass
specs.value: Variable-angle reinforcement + pre-cambered carbon fork inserts

highlights: Directional camber with early-rise tip for float and precision
Pre-cambered carbon fork inserts for energy return and snap
Premium wax-infused sintered base for relentless glide
Available in standard and wide (W) versions
